bead.title: init: add `ddx init --global` umbrella setup and make plain `ddx init` skip plugin install
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)

There is no first-time machine setup command, and `ddx init` bundles plugin install with manifest creation, forcing a plugin write into every newly initialized project instead of lazy-resolving from the global tier.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/init.go bundles plugin install with manifest creation; there is no `--global` umbrella path that installs the default `ddx` plugin globally and writes global config.

PROPOSED FIX
1. `ddx init --global` is the umbrella first-time-setup command: installs the default `ddx` plugin globally to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx (via GlobalPluginDir), creates agent-tier links (~/.claude/skills/ddx and ~/.agents/skills/ddx pointing into ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx/), and writes ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml with convention defaults.
2. `ddx init` (no flag) creates <project>/.ddx/ and its manifest but does NOT install plugins; plugins are lazy-resolved on first use, preferring the project tier over global per the registry precedence bead.

NON-SCOPE
- Install command `--global` flag (sibling install bead).
- Update command and doctor reporting (sibling update bead).
- The runtime precedence implementation (registry bead).
- Removing the existing per-project install (both modes coexist).
- Migrating legacy ~/.config/ddx paths.
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution).
- Registry resolution sibling bead (GlobalPluginDir) — init --global writes through it.

GOVERNING ARTIFACTS
- Epic ddx-602ae31a, Principle 2.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks asserts `ddx init --global` installs the default ddx plugin to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx and that ~/.claude/skills/ddx and ~/.agents/skills/ddx point into ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/ddx/, and that ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/config.yaml is written with convention defaults.
2. TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins asserts `ddx init` (no flag, in-project) creates <project>/.ddx/ and its manifest but does not write under plugins/ — the plugin lazy-resolves from the global tier.
3. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.

Both beads share the same parent, identical AC test names (TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks, TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins), and the same two-part feature scope (ddx init --global umbrella + plain ddx init skips plugin install). The implementation is already present: initGlobal() at cli/cmd/init.go:318, --global flag at cli/cmd/init.go:75, TestInitGlobal_CreatesAgentTierLinks at cli/cmd/init_test.go:735, TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins at cli/cmd/init_test.go:36. Dispatching this bead would produce no_changes.
